message:
feat: React-compatible automation with DOM diff capture

Major improvements for reliable browser automation:

## React Compatibility
- click() now uses CDP Input.dispatchMouseEvent (works with React/Vue/Angular)
- fill() now uses CDP Input.insertText (triggers onChange handlers)
- Smart Tab/Enter handling: \t sends Tab key, \n sends Enter (not literals)

## New keyboard_press Action
- Press special keys: Tab, Enter, Space, Escape, Arrow*, F1-F12
- Supports modifiers: {shift: true}, {ctrl: true}, {alt: true}, {meta: true}
- Example: {"action": "keyboard_press", "payload": "Tab", "modifiers": {"shift": true}}

## Connection Pooling
- Persistent WebSocket connections maintain focus between commands
- Fixes focus lost between eval calls

## Auto-Capture with DOM Diff
- Every DOM action captures before/after state
- Generates diff showing what changed in the DOM
- Files: before.html, after.html, diff.txt, before.png, after.png, page.md
- Session captures stored in XDG cache directory

## Other Improvements
- type selector now optional (types into current focus)
- Better eval return handling for complex objects
- Multi-element selector warnings
- index parameter for select action

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
